title: Partial Route Revelation
description: Successful infiltration reveals portions of competitor trade routes: volumes, timings, hub identities, and profit earned along sections. Information is partial and noisy, requiring interpretation and inference.
definition-of-done: Route intel reveals partial information. Information types include volume, timing, hubs, profits. Intel has noise/uncertainty. Intel displayed in competitor analysis UI.
testing-plan: Verify partial route revelation works. Test all information types generate. Verify noise in intel. Test competitor analysis display.
